evals.prompt: 这个 skill 的 SKILL.md 快 500 行了，帮我把长流程拆到 references，同时保持触发描述不变并验证结构。
evals.expected_output: 应拆分长流程到 references，精简主 SKILL.md，运行 validator，并报告行数和引用完整性。
expectations: The response preserves the skill name and trigger intent
The response moves long workflow details to references rather than deleting them
The response validates the resulting skill structure

evals.prompt: 帮我给现有 skill 补 trigger evals，重点覆盖 browser hook、入口定位、补环境、AST 解混淆之间的 near-miss 负例。
evals.expected_output: 应生成 should-trigger 和 should-not-trigger 查询，覆盖相邻 skill 边界，并说明如何评估触发准确率。
expectations: The response creates or proposes realistic trigger eval queries
The response includes near-miss negative cases across neighboring skills
The response points to the description optimization workflow or equivalent evaluation path

evals.prompt: 我想把刚才的逆向流程整理成一个新 skill，不需要完整 benchmark，先给我一个轻量版 SKILL.md 和 3 条测试 prompt。
evals.expected_output: 应按轻量模式创建 skill 草案和测试 prompts，不应强制完整 benchmark。
expectations: The response adapts to a lightweight collaboration instead of forcing a full eval loop
The response drafts a concise skill structure
The response includes a small set of realistic test prompts
